taxonomy: Cephaloschoenus longisetis is classified within the family Cyperaceae, commonly known as the sedge family. This classification suggests that Cephaloschoenus longisetis is a type of sedge, a large and diverse group of plants. The family Cyperaceae is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Mapanioideae subfamily. Within this subfamily, Cephaloschoenus longisetis would be classified as part of the genus Cephaloschoenus. Further classification would involve identifying the specific species within the genus.
